wizard.consentPrefix: By continuing you agree to our

landing.sub: Everyone shares where they're coming from. You pick the spot that's fair for all — and a time that works.

step1.label: Pin your location
step1.desc: Everyone shares where they're coming from — no faff, no spreadsheets.

step2.label: Vote on dates
step2.desc: Pick the slots that work. The overlap rises to the top.

step3.label: Meet in the middle
step3.desc: A fair spot, a fair time. Done.

fixed.title: Date and time are fixed
fixed.description: You just need location and RSVPs

inviteMode.heading: How do you want to invite people?

sharedLink.title: Share a join link
sharedLink.description: Anyone with the link can join and vote

email.title: Send email invites
email.description: Only the addresses you list can participate

review.heading: Ready to create your event?
review.privacyText: By creating this event you confirm that any participant emails you have provided were collected with their knowledge. Emails are used solely to send event invitations and notifications. See our

name.heading: What's your name?
name.label: Your name
name.errorSave: Failed to save name. Please try again.

location.heading: Where are you coming from?
location.why: Your address is used to find a fair meeting point for the whole group. It's never shared with other participants.
location.errorSave: Failed to save location. Please try again.
location.hintBefore: Your location is used only to calculate a fair meeting point. Coordinates may be processed by OpenRouteService to estimate travel times. See our

review.heading: Ready to submit?
review.errorSubmit: Failed to submit. Please try again.
review.next1: Responses are collected until the voting deadline.
review.next2: The organizer reviews the venue suggestions and picks the best spot and time.
review.next3: You'll receive a confirmation email with the event details.

summary.confirmed: Your time, location and travel preferences have been recorded.

participate.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently erase your name, location, and availability from this event.
participate.dataErased: Your personal data has been erased from this event.

admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the event and all participant data.
admin.deleteError: Failed to delete event. Please try again.
admin.justFinalizedTitle: You're all set — enjoy it with your friends!
admin.justFinalizedBody: The event has been finalized and confirmation emails are on their way. The admin and participation pages are now in read-only mode and will remain accessible until the event takes place.

finalize.heading: Finalize Event
finalize.venueNone: No venue selected — pick one from the list below.
finalize.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Please bring ID, dress code: smart casual…

confirmation.ownLinkHint: Use this to vote and submit your own location.
confirmation.emailNotice: Invite emails have been sent to {{count}} participant(s).

nextSteps.heading: What happens next
nextSteps.step1Shared: Share the link above — participants fill in their availability.
nextSteps.step1Email: Participants will receive their invite email shortly.
nextSteps.step2: You'll get an email when the deadline passes.
nextSteps.step3: Return via your admin link to pick a time and venue.

join.invalidLink: This join link is invalid or has expired.
join.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
join.closed: Voting is closed for this event.
join.pitch: Share your availability and where you're coming from — taliott will find a time and meeting spot that works fairly for everyone.
join.emailHint: We'll use this to send you your personal participation link.

venueList.heading: Venue Recommendations
venueList.noType: Set a venue type to see recommendations.

resend.heading: Recover your link
resend.successMsg: If we found a matching event, we've sent the link to your inbox.

feedback.question: How likely are you to recommend taliott?

errors.timeRangeOrder: Start time must be earlier than end time.

navGuard.title: Unsaved changes
navGuard.body: If you leave now, your progress will be lost.
